## Summary
*Describe what changed and why this change was made.*

## Types of Changes
- [ ] Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Infrastructure / Chore / Documentation

## Verification
### Automated Tests
*List commands run to verify code correctness (e.g. `npm run lint`, `npm run build`).*

### Manual Verification
*List manual steps performed to verify changes (e.g. testing endpoints, UI checks, attaching screenshots).*

## Checklist
- [ ] My code compiles with zero errors
- [ ] My code passes all linter checks
- [ ] I have updated the environment templates (`.env.example`) if new parameters were introduced
- [ ] I have updated relevant folder documentation (`README.md`) if architecture was modified
- [ ] I have followed Conventional Commits naming standards
